nodes.label: AI as systematic matching tool for regulatory compliance
nodes.label_negative: Manual reading and searching of SOPs

nodes.label: AI as first-pass efficiency tool with human critical oversight
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous decision-maker without human check
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI as the first pass for all of the obvious stuff, but then I go through it and critically think about each shortcoming

nodes.grounding_span: I really struggle with the volume limitations

nodes.label: AI integration into workflow
nodes.grounding_span: AI isn't truly integrated into anything I do. I stop my work, open the web app, and then type in what I need

nodes.label: Disclosure of AI use to clients
